title: Eve – Portfolio RAG Assistant
impact: Primary recruiter interface — RAG over vector store
description: A Portfolio Copilot powered by Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Gemini function calling. Built on Supabase pgvector and Edge Functions, Eve retrieves portfolio embeddings, invokes tools to query structured professional data, and surfaces demo links and write-ups as actionable responses for recruiter inquiries.

title: Local AI Agent Ecosystem
impact: Full-stack orchestration project involving Docker, Redis, and Python scripts for local vector database.
description: Building a local AI agent with Docker Compose that indexes PDFs and answers questions using Ollama, covering container setup, networking, security, and a simple frontend for interaction. It uses Redis for vector database and Python scripts for indexing and querying. Available on GitHub.

title: Tab Atlas – Workspace Manager
impact: Maps browser sessions into persistent, human-readable workspaces
description: An intelligent Chrome Extension that de-clutters developer workflows by mapping active browser sessions into 'human-readable' workspaces. It utilizes the Chrome Tab Groups API and local storage to persist project-specific sessions, reducing cognitive load for multi-tasking engineers.

title: Experian Global Blog Migration
description: Architected the migration of a 5K+ article enterprise blog to a headless Gatsby/React architecture. Focused on high-scale content modeling and performance optimization.

title: gac – AI Git Copilot
impact: NPM-distributed CLI for semantic commits and changelog automation
description: AI-powered CLI tool for semantic commit messages and changelog automation. Distributed via NPM.

title: SEO & Accessibility Helper
impact: Real-time WCAG and Core Web Vitals auditing in the browser
description: A Chrome extension for real-time website auditing. Performs on-page SEO analysis, WCAG compliance checks, and Core Web Vitals tracking.

title: SplitFlow – AI Expense Capture
impact: Multimodal receipt parsing via Gemini vision API
description: AI-integrated MVP for shared expense tracking using Google Gemini's multimodal vision capabilities.

title: VersoID – Digital Identity Platform
impact: Multiple professional personas — shareable via QR, one tap to switch
description: A Flutter-based digital identity management app that lets users create and share multiple professional personas with QR codes. Switch between work, creator, and social identities with a single tap. Available on iOS; Android coming soon.

title: DIRA – Design Research Assistant
description: Utility for deconstructing CSS DNA and design tokens (typography, colors) from live websites.

title: Prompt Optimizer
impact: Upgrades prompts for ChatGPT and Gemini — snippets and Ollama in latest release
description: A Chrome extension that upgrades prompts into clearer, more detailed, and more effective versions for AI models like ChatGPT and Google Gemini. The May 2026 release adds snippets and Ollama support.

title: NoteApply AI
description: Privacy-first research companion using Local Ollama and Gemini for voice-to-knowledge extraction.
